source: O'Neill School of Public and Environmental Affairs at IU

news.title: Fantoni honored with pair of best dissertation awards
news.summary_en: O’Neill Ph.D. alum Marylis Fantoni earned national dissertation awards for research on improving domestic violence reporting and public services for survivors.

news.title: O'Neill study shows solar expansion won't threaten food cost or security
news.summary_en: New O’Neill School research finds utility-scale solar expansion on farmland is unlikely to significantly affect U.S. crop production or food prices.
